required_status_checks: Consumer-Owned Claim Admission Gate / Trusted-base candidate inspection
Fork Evidence CI / Claim Boundary and Preservation Checks
Fork Proof-Surface Integration / Python proof surface (ubuntu-latest)
Fork Proof-Surface Integration / Python proof surface (windows-latest)
Fork Proof-Surface Integration / PowerShell 5.1 proof-surface entry point

activation_prerequisites: The trusted-base workflow is present on the repository default branch, from which GitHub loads pull_request_target workflows.
The preservation lineage has been admitted to the default branch through a separately authorized operation.
Every named required check has completed successfully at least once on the target branch lineage.
A repository administrator independently verifies exact check names before applying the ruleset.
non_claims: This record does not apply repository settings.
This record does not authorize a main-branch ruleset change.
This record does not certify the listed controls as sufficient for every threat model.
